title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 378.645 - Review of director's decisions, how
text:
378.645.  Review of director's decisions, how. — All decisions and findings of the director made under the provisions of this chapter shall be subject to review by proper proceedings in any court of competent jurisdiction in this state.
(L. 1992 S.B. 831 § 378.639) 
Effective 1-01-93
